notes: New shieldbreak. 27 primary-research studies screened from 1178 raw PubMed hits across 12 intervention-family queries. 40 rows generated at (study x tissue x timepoint-cluster) granularity. Many numeric Treg PD values live in figures/supplement and are recorded as null with notes — follow-up full-text extraction pass warranted. 6 reviews captured in reviews.jsonl side-list. Notable surfaced conflict: Attia 2005 (DD failed in melanoma) vs Dannull 2005 (DD depleted Tregs in RCC) — both retained. Rendered against styles/treg-depletion/STYLE.md.

Backfill pass over 40 rows from the initial 2026-04-23 run. Fetched full text via PMC E-utilities for 28 rows (PMCID-bearing + 6 newly discovered via Europe PMC search); 10 rows remain abstract-only because journals are not in Europe PMC OA (Int J Cancer, Clin Exp Immunol, J Immunother, Clin Cancer Res subscription, Br J Dermatol, Inflamm Bowel Dis, Cancer Discov). Backfilled numeric baseline+post values on 28/38 rows (74%). EXCLUDED 2 rows to excluded.jsonl: Telang 2011 (PMID 22165955) — Phase II DD trial but no Treg measurement performed in this cohort, title is misleading; Galsky 2025 PORTER (PMID 39964352) — nivolumab combination platform, Tregs not targeted or pre-specified. Reclassified Liao 2024 ascites row from 'succeeded' to 'partial' (p=0.2737 n.s. with small n=3). Hamid 2011 intent reclassified from 'exploratory-but-prespecified' to 'incidental-but-measured' — baseline-only biomarker study, not depletion endpoint. New PMCIDs added for Chand 2024 (PMC11609826), Gogas 2024 (PMC11258232), Vaishampayan 2024 (PMC11580269), Calvo 2025 (PMC12323519), Piha-Paul 2025 (PMC12574322). New conflict pairs surfaced / sharpened: (a) Ager 2026 (Fc-enhanced anti-CTLA-4 depletes TI-Tregs, p=0.031) vs Sharma 2019 (non-Fc-enhanced anti-CTLA-4 fails to deplete) — Fc engineering is the reconciling variable; (b) Huang 2011 tremelimumab INCREASED intratumoral FOXP3+ cells 35→167 cells/mm^2 (p=0.0029) corroborates Sharma 2019's broader null; (c) Gogas 2024 PIVOT-02 shows 8-10x Treg absolute expansion with bempeg outpacing CD8 2x expansion — the bempeg ratio-shift path is actually unfavorable in this dataset. Honest caveat: older denileukin-diftitox papers (Audia 2007, Atchison 2010, Mahnke 2007) and older CTLA-4 papers (Ribas 2009, Nancey 2012) are in non-OA journals and could not be backfilled beyond abstract values.
